title: あの日、あの時、ちゃんこ鍋

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Here! Canned mackerel mixed rice, ready to eat! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When we realized we'd be camping out waiting for the first bus, Hishi
Akebono whipped out a portable gas burner and multiple cooking
utensils to make us a delicious meal.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't that smell good? I think it turned out juuust right. And don't
worry, there's plenty of leftovers, so eat your fill, okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a bite and marvel at the flavors I'm tasting. The warm rice
soothes both my heart and aching body. I'm reminded of just how
resourceful she is in a pinch.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, thank you. ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But I wouldn't be half the cook I am today without my parents.
They're both amazing cooks themselves.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: The soups and hot pots they make are filled with the sweetest of stocks, and their hamburgers and fried chicken are extra juicy.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Whenever people taste their food, a big smile follows each bite. It's
absolutely amazing.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Seeing that, I could feel this desire well up inside me. I wanna be a
racer that makes people smile too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That story didn't end how I expected it to. Wouldn't it be easier for
her to bring people joy through her cooking?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curious, I ask her why she would enter Tracen instead of a culinary
school.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: How do I put this... Hmmm, you see...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: When I was a kid, I wanted to be a big pot of chanko!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My apparent confusion encourages Hishi Akebono to continue her
story, and she tells me of a television special she witnessed as a child.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Today we'd like to highlight the hot pot sumo wrestlers often
eat—chanko. Our guests today are former sumo wrestlers who made
this dish regularly.

text_block_list.name: Former Sumo Wrestler
text_block_list.text:
Chanko is something we wrestlers eat every day as a group. It fills our
bellies while also giving us the energy needed to grow stronger.

text_block_list.name: Former Sumo Wrestler
text_block_list.text:
But it's especially important after a hard-fought match. A satisfying
meal enjoyed while surrounded by friends... Nothing gets you more
ready to keep working hard than that.

text_block_list.name: Young Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Woooow! Chanko's the best thing everrr! So that's why sumo wrestlers
are so strong! They eat lots and lots of the heartiest hot pot ever!

text_block_list.name: Young Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
When I grow up, I wanna be a pot of chanko! Then I'll gather
everybody in the same place and get 'em ready to work hard too!

text_block_list.name: Young Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: ...Uh-oh. If I'm the hot pot, does that mean I can't have any?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Realizing that, I gave up on literally becoming a pot of chanko.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But even if I knew I couldn't actually be a hot pot, that special still
stuck with me. I read books on the subject, made my own recipes...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And then one day, I heard something wonderful while watching a
post-match interview on TV.

text_block_list.name: Sumo Wrestler
text_block_list.text:
He was strong, all right—too strong. I can tell now that I wasn't ready
for this fight, but... I still gave it everything I've got!

text_block_list.name: Young Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Mama, why is the sumo wrestler smiling? He lost, didn't he? He was
crying just before...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono's Mother
text_block_list.text: Well... I'm sure he's proud of himself and what he managed to do.

text_block_list.name: Young Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember what he said? He gave this fight everything he's
got. Going up against a big, strong fighter is a lot harder than it
sounds.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono's Mother
text_block_list.text: But he still did it. I'm sure he's very, very happy.

text_block_list.name: Young Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I get it... He's probably got a warm, full feeling in his tummy. That's...
kinda like what happens when they eat chanko!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono's Mother
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I think what little me was trying to say is that if I can go up against a
strong opponent with everything I got, maybe I can become a chanko
after all.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I want to be a runner that gives every race her all! That way, whether I
win or lose, I'll still make people smile!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: That's why I entered Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ah, hearing that must've been a bit of a surprise, huh? Well, I'm
surprised too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: To be honest, I think this is the first time I ever put my thoughts into words. Obviously I knew I wanted to make people smile with my racing, but I never really thought about why.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Who would've thought a TV special could have such an effect on my
running. Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her tale ended up being a bit of a whirlwind experience for both of
us, but I have a better idea of what motivates her now.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yawn...Finally back at school. What a trip, huh, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We arrive back at the academy a little after eight o' clock. Despite
my aching body and a general lack of sleep, I don't actually feel that
tired.
choice_data_list:
(Maybe Hishi Akebono's resilience is rubbing
off on me.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No one could tell she just spend the night camping. In fact, she looks
incredibly well-rested.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Well, I've got a scrimmage today, so I should get going. Go home and
get plenty of rest, okay?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Huh? Didn't I tell you?
